loggin.html: Cloud Secure Login
loggin.script: const u = document.getElementById('user').value; const p = document.getElementById('pass').value; if(u === 'admin' && p === '1234') { renderScreen('calculator'); } else { alert('Galat Username ya Password!'); }

calculator.html:
Simple Interest Calculator

Result yahan dikhega...
calculator.script:
const p = parseFloat(document.getElementById('p_amt').value); const r = parseFloat(document.getElementById('r_rate').value); const t = parseFloat(document.getElementById('t_time').value); if(isNaN(p) || isNaN(r) || isNaN(t)) { alert('Sahi numbers daalein!'); return; } const interest = (p * r * t) / 100; const total = p + interest; document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = 'Interest: ₹' + interest.toFixed(2) + '
Total Amount: ₹' + total.toFixed(2);

pdf_maker.html: Cloud PDF Maker
pdf_maker.script: const title = document.getElementById('pdf_title').value; const content = document.getElementById('pdf_content').value; if(!title || !content) { alert('Kripya saari details bharein!'); return; } const blob = new Blob(['Title: ' + title + '\n\n' + content], { type: 'text/plain' }); const link = document.createElement('a'); link.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob); link.download = title + '.txt'; link.click();
